dsl_rule.translation_notes: Divergence signal implemented using price direction (close vs prev_close) versus momentum direction (macd_hist sign). Long entry: price rising but momentum falling (bearish divergence, reversal signal). Short entry: price falling but momentum rising (bullish divergence, reversal signal). Exit conditions use MACD histogram crossing zero as momentum reversal confirmation. Momentum indicator defaults to MACD as closest available proxy; specific divergence magnitude thresholds not provided by author.

backtest_rule.reason: Divergence signal implemented using price direction (close vs prev_close) versus momentum direction (macd_hist sign). Long entry: price rising but momentum falling (bearish divergence, reversal signal). Short entry: price falling but momentum rising (bullish divergence, reversal signal). Exit conditions use MACD histogram crossing zero as momentum reversal confirmation. Momentum indicator defaults to MACD as closest available proxy; specific divergence magnitude thresholds not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Enter a trade when prices and momentum move in opposite directions with sufficient magnitude of divergence, indicating an imminent price direction change.
